title: USCIS Extends OPT STEM Extension Processing Times
summary: USCIS has announced extended processing times for STEM OPT extension applications. Students should apply at least 90 days before their OPT expires.
affectMessage: Affects F1 STEM students — apply early

title: DHS Announces No Changes to H1B Cap for FY2027
summary: The Department of Homeland Security confirmed the H1B cap remains unchanged at 65,000 visas plus 20,000 for advanced degree holders for FY2027.
affectMessage: No changes — H1B cap stays the same

title: White House Immigration Executive Order — What It Actually Means
summary: A new executive order was signed regarding border security. Despite viral headlines, this does NOT affect currently valid F1 or H1B visa holders already in the US.
affectMessage: Does NOT affect current F1/H1B holders in the US
mythClaim: All student visas are being revoked immediately
mythFact: This order only affects new border crossings, not existing valid visa holders.

title: New Travel Advisory for H1B Holders Visiting Certain Countries
summary: DHS has issued a travel advisory recommending H1B holders consult with an immigration attorney before traveling internationally during the current policy review period.
affectMessage: Affects H1B holders — consult lawyer before travel

title: F1 CPT Authorization Process Remains Unchanged
summary: USCIS confirmed that Curricular Practical Training authorization processes for F1 students remain unchanged. Students should continue to work with their DSO.
affectMessage: No changes to CPT — you're fine

title: California Passes State-Level Immigrant Worker Protections
summary: California has enacted additional state-level protections for immigrant workers, including H1B holders, ensuring workplace rights cannot be violated based on immigration status.
affectMessage: Good news for CA residents — extra protections added
